prestazioni: SOHC L15B7 (1.5L turbocharged) engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade to a **Garrett GT2259S** turbocharger with a **PRL Motorsports** billet compressor wheel and **Tomei** 3-inch stainless downpipe, paired with a **Hondata FlashPro** custom tune targeting 22 psi on E85 for 220+ whp (stock internals safe limit).

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (N-One RS-specific valving) and **Cusco** 22mm front / 19mm rear sway bars, combined with **SuperPro** poly bushings (front lower control arms, rear trailing arms) to eliminate torque steer under boost.

Drivetrain reinforcement: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (N-One RS-specific 1.5-way) with **K-Tuned** lightweight flywheel and **Exedy Stage 2 clutch**, mated to a **KAAZ** 1.5-way differential for FWD torque vectoring control.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works N-One RS** widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards) paired with **Voltex** Type-3 rear wing (300mm chord, carbon fiber) for -15kg downforce at 100 mph.
**Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 15x7 +38 wheels (185/50R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD09 tires) with **Buddy Club Racing Spec II** extended wheel studs and **Project Kics** lug nuts for track-ready fitment.

**Recaro Sportster CS** (N-One RS-specific mounting brackets) with **Takata Drift III** 4-point harnesses, **Sparco** 6-point bolt-in roll cage (JDM-spec, TÜV-approved), and **Defi Advance BF** digital gauge cluster (boost, oil temp, wideband AFR) integrated into the A-pillar.
